Description:en: This is a labset to collect all test as set members. To be used in o3 which only picks tests that are members to a labset.

Fully specified name:en: HELICOBACTOR PYLORI AB PRESENCE IN SERUM BY IMMUNOFLUORESCENCE TEST
Description:en: A lab test to detect the presence of Helicobacter Pylori using immunoflorescence.

Fully specified name:en: HELICOBACTOR PYLORI ANTIGEN TEST IN STOOL
Description:en: laboratory test that detects the presence of H. pylori proteins (antigens) in a stool sample.
It is commonly measured in blood to help diagnose autoimmune diseases, especially Rheumatoid arthritis.

Fully specified name:en: YEAST PRESENCE IN URINE SEDIMENT BY LIGHT MICROSCOPY
Description:en: A lab test to identify the presence of yeast cells in the urine using a light microscope.

Fully specified name:en: CASTS PRESENCE IN URINE SEDIMENT BY LIGHT MICROSCOPY

Fully specified name:en: TRICHOMONAS VAGINALIS PRESENCE IN URINE SEDIMENT BY LIGHT MICROSCOPY
